calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-10-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories, Set One, Propounded On Defendant Jeanette Vilches
Off Calendar May-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference.
Nadja Green, ESQ. of Delfino Green & Green Tel:(415) 442-4646 for plaintiff.
Stanley W. Riddell, ESQ. of Law Office of Stanley Riddell Tel: (415) 409-7611 for defendant.

Hearing is held. The matter agrued. Defendant counsel contest the tentative ruling regarding good cause and sanctions. Defendant request to court to decrese the sanction and add more time to respond interrogatories. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Frank M. Vilches's motion to compel further responses from Defendant Jeanette Vilches to special interrogatories (set one) and form interrogatories (set one) and monetary sanctions is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

**An order Granting Plaintiff's Motion to compel signed after hearing.**

PLAINTIFF FRANK VILCHES'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, AND PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, PROPOUNDED ON DEFENDANT JEANETTE VILCHES (TENTATIVE RULING PART 2OF 2)
